query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_puzzles, COUNT(DISTINCT openingName) as unique_openings FROM puzzles; SELECT openingName, COUNT(*) as puzzle_count FROM puzzles GROUP BY openingName ORDER BY puzzle_count DESC;
